revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Date-mf]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Date-mf]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>
{{date|{{{1|13 November 1933}}}|liso}}{{#ifeq:{{{2|}}}|dtstart|T00:00|T23:59}}{{{1|13 November 1933}}}[[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]
{{{ISO8601|{{date|{{{1|13 November 1933}}}|liso}}{{#if:{{{time|}}}|T{{{time}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|}}}|dtstart|T00:00|T23:59}}}}}}}{{{1|13 November 1933}}}[[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1| }}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{{ISO8601|{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH}}}|1|1}}}}Z}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1| }}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH}}}|1|1}}}}Z) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{{ISO8601|{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d TH}}}|1|1}}}}Z}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{#ifeq:{{{ISO8601| }}}| |{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d}}}|1|1}}}}{{#switch:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|-m-d TH|-m-d TH:i|-m-d TH:i:s=Z}}|{{{1}}}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

revision.comment: Prior version emitted Z only if time specified. However, an event could also be on a different day or month or year than UTC is on. see WP:UF talk
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{#ifeq:{{{ISO8601| }}}| |{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d}}}|1|1}}}}Z|{{{1}}}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{#ifeq:{{{ISO8601| }}}| |{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d}}}|1|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{timezone| }}}| ||Z}}|{{{1}}}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{#ifeq:{{{ISO8601| }}}| |{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d}}}|1|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{timezone| }}}| ||Z}}|{{{1}}}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]] hahaha this isn't protescted lol!

{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{#ifeq:{{{ISO8601| }}}| |{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d}}}|1|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{timezone| }}}| ||Z}}|{{{ISO8601|}}}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{#ifeq:{{{ISO8601| }}}| |{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d}}}|1|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{timezone| }}}| ||Z}}|{{{ISO8601|}}}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]] What a Twat!

{{#dateformat:{{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} }} ({{#ifeq:{{{ISO8601| }}}| |{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d}}}|1|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{timezone| }}}| ||Z}}|{{{ISO8601|}}}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars]]

revision.comment: Undid revision 315432102 by [[Special:Contributions/Hgrosser|Hgrosser]] ([[User talk:Hgrosser|talk]]) - {{Start-date}}, {{Birth-date}}, {{End-date}}, and {{Death-date}} are meant to display date as entered and mimic both visible and hidden output of {{Start date}}, {{Birth date}}, {{End date}}, and {{Death date}} - see examples and testcases for each
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{test| }}}| ||{{{up-date}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||BCE}}}} ({{#ifeq:{{{ISO8601| }}}| |{{#ifeq:{{{BCE| }}}| ||-}}{{Four digit|{{#expr:{{#time:Y|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|1}}}}-3000 }}}}{{#time:{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|2}}|{{#ifeq:{{{class|dtend}}}|dtend|{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d/+1 hour ,}}}|1|3}}}}{{#titleparts:{{{up-date|/-m-d}}}|1|1}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{timezone| }}}| ||Z}}|{{{ISO8601|}}}}}) {{documentation}}

revision.comment: reduce complexity by using padleft: parserfunction directly

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Date-mf here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
